detailed_description.heading: Cost-Effective SFP Module
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik XS+85LC01D is a versatile and cost-effective SFP module designed for short-range, high-speed data transmission applications. It's ideal for connecting MikroTik routers, switches, and other networking devices within a rack or across short distances in data centers, enterprise networks, and even home setups. MikroTik XS+85LC01D supports data transfer speeds of 1.25 Gbps, 10 Gbps, and 25 Gbps, offering flexibility for various network environments. Optimized for distances up to 100 meters in full-duplex 25 Gigabit mode, the XS+85LC01D is perfect for applications where long-range connectivity is not required, such as within data centers, enterprise networks, or connecting buildings on the same campus.

detailed_description.heading: Fiber Optic Connectivity
detailed_description.text: MikroTik XS+85LC01D utilizes a standard LC connector on both ends for easy installation and compatibility with most SFP/SFP+ ports, providing immunity to electromagnetic interference and enabling cleaner signal transmission. The module is easy to install and use. Simply insert the XS+85LC01D into a compatible SFP slot on your MikroTik device for a quick and hassle-free connection. The module operates at the 850nm wavelength, a common choice for multimode fiber optic cables. It is designed to work seamlessly with a wide range of MikroTik routers and switches, including CCR routers, RB netPower series, and CRS/CSS switches.

detailed_description.heading: Durable and reliable
detailed_description.text: MikroTik XS+85LC01D is built to last with high-quality components to ensure reliable performance over an extended lifespan. The module supports a wide operating temperature range from -40°C to +85°C, ensuring reliable performance in various environments. XS+85LC01D provides built-in digital diagnostic functions to monitor key parameters such as optical power, transceiver supply voltage, temperature, and laser bias current. This allows for proactive maintenance and troubleshooting. This SFP module is a reliable solution for short-range fiber optic networking applications. Its multi-speed compatibility, compact design, and wide operating temperature range make it a versatile choice for expanding your network efficiently.
